title: Ancho Chilli Chicken Stew
summary: Using up your leftovers from the Ancho Chilli Chicken Traybake, this stew is super comforting and gets on the table in under 20 mins!

method.description: Make the Ancho Chilli Chicken Traybake.

Slice the leftover chicken. Tip the chicken and beans into a saucepan with the chopped tomatoes. Cover and bring to the boil over a medium heat. Let it simmer until bubbling and piping hot. 
Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Roughly chop the coriander. Drain the jalapeños.
Serve the stew in bowls and top with a dollop of soured cream, coriander and jalapeños.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
